case_title: TERI MARTINEZ VS. DENISE MITCHELL et al

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, TERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, DENISE MITCHELL, RAYMOND LUIB, RAINA MITCHELL, SHAALIYAH MITCHELL, DELENA MITCHELL, EMMANUEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
